programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Halloween and the Election vs. The Pandemic
programme.desc: Mary is devastated that Halloween has been canceled by the city, so Darlene and Becky enlist Jackie and the rest of the family to create an unforgettable experience; Mark goes toe-to-toe with a kid at school who doesn't believe in wearing a mask.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Relief from Inflammation
programme.desc: Connie Craig-Carrol & Founder Ken Meares investigates Omega XL, the ultimate all-natural solution for joint pain from inflammation.

programme.desc: Elizabeth Stanton takes a look at the very latest in the world of pop entertainment, plus exclusive interviews, trends and gossip.

programme.desc: An ancient water village in China; the markets of Bangkok; the coastal waters of Hong Kong; skyscrapers of Singapore.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: NASCAR Countdown Live
programme.desc: A pre-race lead-up to NASCAR racing.

programme.title: Live: NASCAR O'Reilly Auto Parts Series
programme.desc: Drivers battle for 200 laps at Texas Motor Speedway. Justin Allgaier seeks his third win of the campaign at the 1.5-mile quad-oval. Toyota looks to reclaim dominance at the venue, while Jesse Love leads the rookie of the year race.
